Video.summary: Sheri Courter and Christine Karges take on Diane Wainio and Karin Kochis in this Women's Senior Pro Backdraw Match.

Video.summary: Tune in for a high-energy match between the Gilbert Gladiators and the Tempe Tornadoes at The Orchard in Scottsdale, Arizona. This April 25, 2023 episode of Tuesday Night Pickleball features fast-paced action and strategic plays as both teams battle it out in a pivotal match. With sharp shots, effective communication, and critical moments, the Gladiators and Tornadoes go head-to-head for a thrilling finish. Watch as the teams showcase their pickleball prowess in one of the most exciting events of the AZ PBL season.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes
Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes
Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes

Video.summary: Andrei Daescu & Dave Weinbach take on Altaf Merchant & John Cincola in a Men's Pro Split Age Gold medal match
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Split Age - Gold

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Split Age - Gold
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Split Age - Gold

Video.summary: Indiana’s Asplund and Safdar challenge Virginia’s Bieger and Singsank in the 2025 DUPR National Championship Mixed Doubles Final, showcasing elite collegiate pickleball skill and teamwork.
Video.title: Mixed Final - Indiana vs. Virginia

Image.alt: Mixed Final - Indiana vs. Virginia
Mixed Final - Indiana vs. Virginia
Mixed Final - Indiana vs. Virginia

Video.summary: We are live in sunny San Diego for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This high-stakes collegiate team match features the University of San Diego (USD) battling Grand Canyon University (GCU) in a best-of-seven series.The action includes intense Men's Doubles , Women's Singles , and Mixed Doubles as these teams compete for regional dominance. Watch top talent, including GCU's lefty powerhouse Adam Jones, who boasts a strong 5.6 singles rating , and his partner Xavier Cook Nakakuki. On the USD side, the episode highlights the partnership of Marcus Hopkins and Ryan, an impressive grad student player with high doubles ratings. USD’s Bella also shows grit in the women's singles match. This broadcast captures the best of college pickleball in an amazing format.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU

Video.summary: The Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal at the 2023 English Nationals delivers a riveting showdown as rising talents Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf take on the experienced pairing of Wesley Jackson and Bernie Audibert. Every point is a test of patience, power, and precision, with both teams refusing to back down in this critical battle for a spot in the semifinals.With crowd energy building and momentum swinging back and forth, this match captures the grit and skill that define top-tier British pickleball. Who will punch their ticket to the next round?
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Quarterfinal – Wren & Woolf vs Jackson & Audibert

Video.summary: The NPL men face off as the Scorpions take on the Iconics.
Video.title: NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mens)

Image.alt: NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mens)
NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mens)
NPL - Scorpions vs Iconics (Mens)

Video.summary: Welcome to Week 3, Day 1 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025, live from the Barnes Tennis Center in the heart of San Diego, California. This highly anticipated state rivalry pits the UCLA Bruins against the SDSU Aztecs in a crucial best-of-seven collegiate team match.The match format prioritizes singles, with UCLA winning the coin toss and opting to start with Women's Singles. The broadcast features the Women's Singles match between Mae Lee (UCLA) and Emily Miller (SDSU), and the Men's Singles where SDSU's Preston Lynch takes a commanding early lead. The match also includes Gender Doubles, where SDSU (the Aztecs) took an early 3-0 lead in the overall match score. The winner of this pool play match gains a strong position for seeding, moving closer to securing one of the National Championship bids.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach, this Round of 16 matchup from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Penn State battling Liberty University for a spot in the quarterfinals. With a bid to the National Championship on the line, the stakes are incredibly high in this win-or-go-home match.The contest goes the distance, pushing both teams to their limits. After splitting the initial six games 3-3, the match culminates in a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7). Watch standout performances from Liberty's John McCutcheon and Anneliese Brielle, who fight to keep their team alive, and Penn State's Caitlin Hartman and Theodore De Sousa, who deliver clutch plays under pressure.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty

Video.summary: Anna Leigh Waters and James Johnson take on Jorja Johnson and Gabriel Tardio in this Mixed Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal - S01E40

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal - S01E40
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal - S01E40
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal - S01E40

Video.summary: Welcome back to the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships for the Men's Pro Doubles semifinal match. This is a great representation of the sport's global growth, with the top-ranked player from India competing. The match features teams Munro and Yang against Bhatia and Mehta. The match is tightly contested, with the level of play stepping up as they enter the semi-finals. The caption file also notes that Bhatia's grandfather was a world-renowned cricketer in India with the nickname "the Sultan of Swing," which is comparable to an NFL star like Tom Brady.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Video.summary: In this US Open 2025 Pro Women's Doubles match, the Waters duo (Anna Lee Waters and Lee Waters) take on Amanda Rosati and Kaitlyn Campbell. The commentators highlight the Waters' dominant performance, particularly Anna Lee's disguised shots and aggressive play, as they secure a swift victory. They also discuss the challenges of the progressive draw format in pickleball and preview Anna Lee Waters' upcoming mixed doubles match with Andre Agassi.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Video.summary: Parris Todd and Judit Castillo Gargallo face off in the 2023 US Open Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match. A high-stakes showdown of rising stars, intense rallies, and top-tier shotmaking.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Parris Todd vs Judit Castillo Gargallo

Video.summary: Experience the thrilling showdown at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships as twin brothers Hunter Johnson and Yates Johnson face off for the very first time in the men's pro singles gold medal match. Both top seeds with years of experience playing doubles together, these brothers bring a unique dynamic filled with expert strategy, rapid exchanges, and emotional rivalry. From early leads and tactical shot-making to late-game drama and camaraderie, watch Hunter and Yates battle it out point by point in a historic and captivating final. Featuring expert commentary and insights into their playing styles, this match is a must-watch for pickleball fans everywhere.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson

Video.summary: Mixed Pro split age - Megan Fudge & Paul Olin competing with Eva Welsher & Kyle Yates in the first Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal 1

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal 1
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal 1
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal 1

Video.summary: Watch the opening tie of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) from the CCI Brabourne Stadium! The action features Men's Singles between American Champion Brandon Lane (Mumbai) and Polish #1 Mathias Matysik (Pune), followed by Women's Doubles (Katie Morris & Glauca Lane) and Men's Doubles where Vansh Kapadia and his partner secure Pune's first match win. Experience high-stakes professional pickleball where every point counts for the WPBL semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1

Video.summary: Witness an intense showdown in Day 3, Tie 2 of the World Pickleball League Season 2 as the Chennai Super Champs face off against the home favorites, Mumbai Pickle Power, at the Jio World Garden. This episode features a mix of elite athleticism and star-studded entertainment, starting with a special appearance by legendary Bollywood choreographer Bosco Martis, who discusses the rhythmic similarities between dance and pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden as the high-stakes battle for the top four intensifies between the Hyderabad Superstars and Delhi Dilwale. With legendary co-owner Sunil Gavaskar watching from the sidelines, the Dilwale look to maintain their winning streak against a fiercely aggressive Hyderabad squad known for their wild celebrations and relentless energy. This tie features a series of high-octane clashes, from the strategic precision of Shawn Mendes and Alejandra Lopez in women’s singles to the "grueling" 15-minute sprints of elite doubles play. As the "Band of Honor" leaderboard hangs in the balance, every rally becomes a desperate fight for survival in one of the world's most prestigious pickleball arenas.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1

Video.summary: The high-stakes action of Day 7 in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) features a decisive matchup between Pune United and the Delhi Dilwale. With the semi-final race tightening, both teams are fighting fiercely for vital points.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2

Video.summary: The DUPR Collegiate National Championship concludes with a thrilling Women's Doubles showdown as the University of Virginia (UVA) takes on Utah Tech. Watch UVA's Alexander McDonald battle Utah Tech's Cammy Bliss and Avery Beck in a high-stakes, best-of-three match.
Video.title: Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech
Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech
Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: It's Pickleball pro Matt Manasse & NFL Quarterback Drew Brees versus Pickleball Pro Lew Halski & former NFL player Matt Stinchcomb.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2022 - Men's Doubles 2

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the high-stakes Women's Doubles Open Final featuring Team England against Team Spain. Defending champions Spain, represented by the powerhouse duo of Sabrina Mendez and Glauka Carvajal, look to secure their second consecutive title against the English pair of Thaddea Lock and Katy Morris.
Video.title: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal

Image.alt: Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
Women's Doubles Open Final - Lock/Morris vs. Mendez/Carvajal
